prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
# Rainy Sunday Lunch Menu for Two Old Friends

## First Course
Roasted Butternut Squash Soup with Brown Butter Sage Croutons

## Main Course
Braised Short Ribs with Red Wine Reduction
Creamy Parmesan Polenta
Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Balsamic Glaze

## Dessert
Warm Apple Crumble with Vanilla Bean Ice Cream
